assertions.assertion: Uses context.Caller to differentiate between token types
assertions.rationale: context.Caller is checked to differentiate between identity token and access token paths

assertions.assertion: Emits a minimal claim set (e.g. just name) for identity tokens
assertions.rationale: For identity tokens, only adds JwtClaimTypes.Name and returns early

assertions.assertion: Emits a richer claim set for access tokens, using AddRequestedClaims for scope filtering
assertions.rationale: For access tokens, builds a full claim set and uses context.AddRequestedClaims(claims)
